name: codex-sparkompass
description: Token-saving context compression and prompt preparation for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Verified context control and token-saving preparation for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Sparkompass helps Codex users reduce avoidable context by auditing repositories, building semantic inventories, creating verified ContextPacks, and exposing MCP tools for targeted lookup, source evidence, cache, and delta context.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Sparkompass to prepare this Codex run.
Create a verified ContextPack for this log.
Build a semantic inventory for this repo.
